${modID}:PowerID.NAME: Ultimate Power
DESCRIPTIONS: You are Very Cool and Strong.

${modID}:CollateralDamagePower.NAME: Collateral Damage
DESCRIPTIONS: Deal damage to a random enemy whenever you take damage during your turn.

${modID}:RegenerationPower.NAME: Regeneration
DESCRIPTIONS: Heal whenever you take damage during your turn.

${modID}:DelayedRegenerationPower.NAME: Delayed Regeneration
DESCRIPTIONS: Heal %d HP at the start of your next %d turn(s).

${modID}:StrategicStrikesPower.NAME: Strategic Strikes
DESCRIPTIONS: card(s) whenever you play a card containing "Strike".

${modID}:FacingDestinyPower.NAME: Facing Destiny
DESCRIPTIONS: Immune to damage for %d more turn(s). NL At the end of combat, heal %d HP.

${modID}:SurpassingPower.NAME: Surpassing
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain 1 Strength this turn.

${modID}:SurpassingPowerUpg.NAME: Surpassing+
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity this turn.

${modID}:MorphingPower.NAME: No One Will Pass
DESCRIPTIONS: Whenever you lose HP during your turn, gain Block.
